default.title: Obtain the Sinner
default.text: A pleasure to meet you, Chief. I assure you, my methods will bring a "peace" to your operations that you never thought possible.

default.title: Raise to Phase 1
default.text: I pray our foes are wise enough to recognize the cliff's edge before they feel the need to test the fall.

default.title: Raise to Phase 3
default.text: I hear the joyous melodies of peace.

default.title: Level Start
default.text: A regrettable failure of diplomacy. It seems we must now proceed to more... definitive measures.

default.title: Victory
default.text: May peace guide your path.

default.title: Lose Battles
default.text: As long as we are speaking, change remains possible.

default.title: Ultimate Skill
default.text: For the purest form of peace!

default.title: Die in Battles
default.text: After all... to end like this...

default.title: Greeting
default.text: May your heart be at peace today. Would you like a cup of soothing herbal tea?

default.title: Conversation 1
default.text: I find myself drawn to what shines... pearls, seashells, the white of a dove's wings, the radiance of a kind soul, and... a hope that refuses to be broken.

default.title: Conversation 2
default.text: Oh, I appreciate the warning. But a lady must know how to navigate a dirty world without soiling her gloves. It's a skill I've perfected.

default.title: Conversation 3
default.text: My task is not to broker friendships, but to map the alignment of interests. You will find that even between opposing cliffs, there lies a common valley.

default.title: Special Conversation 1
default.text: My little birds sing me all the city's secrets. Do be kind to the sparrow on your sill; one never knows what secrets it might be sharing with me.

default.title: Special Conversation 2
default.text: My teacher's first lesson was on the many forms of persuasion. I was the most adept student in the class. Would you care for a demonstration?

default.title: Special Conversation 3
default.text: There is never one path to peace. The road I walk and the one you choose may seem worlds apart... yet I believe all worthy paths, however divergent, ultimately converge upon the same horizon.

default.title: Full Compliance
default.text: I truly admire your integrity and courage. In a world so often shrouded in darkness, you shine with a warmth and brilliance that is truly rare. It's a light I feel compelled to safeguard. I sincerely hope to see it one day reach every corner of this world. And when it does, please... let me be the one standing closest to its source.

default.title: Idle
default.text: Rest now, in peace. The storm has finally quieted...

default.title: Annoyed
default.text: I find myself coveting these hands of yours... hands that can paint a vision for a better world, yet issue an order to end a life. Tell me, Chief, will you give them to me? Or will I have to... claim them for myself?

default.title: Special Attention
default.text: Heh, who sent you to watch me? The 9th Agency? EDGE? Or... was this your own initiative?

default.title: Dispatch
default.text: Very well, I shall go and make them see reason.

default.title: Dispatch Complete
default.text: Mutual understanding is the most durable bridge to peace.

default.title: Level Up
default.text: One's repertoire can never be too broad.

default.title: Pat Head
default.text: Chief, do you need a sympathetic ear, or would a more... permanent solution be more effective?
